text:
was a in the Scout Regiment Fourth Squad under the command of Hange Zoë.

Appearance

Rashad sported a short, light-colored haircut; with it trimmed close to the scalp in the back. He wore the standard Scout Regiment uniform.

Personality

While Rashad was shown to be a brave and conditioned soldier, he also showed himself to be a rather considerate man, watching over Ymir's damaged body with Nifa. He was also shown to prioritize his fellow soldiers' well-being over immediate threats to himself, retrieving water to soothe burned soldiers while engaged with the Colossal Titan.

Story

Clash of the Titans arc

When the Scout Regiment regroups atop Wall Rose, Rashad examines Ymir's comatose body with Nifa. Shortly after, Bertholdt Hoover and Reiner Braun betray the Scouts in an attempt to kidnap Eren Jaeger and Ymir, Rashad asks for water to sooth a soldier who is burned by steam from the Colossal Titan. Hange then leaves Rashad in command of Teams three and four and orders them to stay on standby behind Bertholdt's Colossal Titan form, while Hange helps Eren with the attack on the Armored Titan.

Legacy

War for Paradis arc

When Hange decides to oppose Eren's plan to destroy the world beyond the Walls, Rashad is one of the soldiers remembered while Hange tries to convince Jean and Mikasa that their fallen comrades would not support destroying the world.

When Hange sacrifices their life to ensure their comrades' escape from the Rumbling in Odiha, Rashad is among the souls of fallen Scouts to welcome them in death.

Trivia

Rashad is an Arabic name meaning "righteous" or "blameless."
